text_original: You may add filter at the search result, thats it for now. Also if you guys okay, personally, I want the memory expansion, not the AI itself, but expand about how much character did we create at each message or chat bot.
text_zh: 你可以在搜索结果中添加过滤器，目前就这样。另外，如果你们没意见的话，就我个人而言，我想要内存扩展，不是指 AI 本身，而是扩展我们在每条消息或聊天机器人中创建的角色数量。
reply_original:
Wow, thank you for the 5-star review! Your suggestions are brilliant. We actually just launched a filter function on the homepage to help you find characters more easily!

Regarding memory expansion and increasing the character limit for bot creation, I've shared this directly with our Product Team.
reply_zh:
哇，感谢您的五星好评！您的建议非常棒。实际上，我们刚刚在首页上线了筛选功能，可以帮您更轻松地找到角色！

关于内存扩展和提高机器人创建的字符限制，我已经直接反馈给我们的产品团队了。
